frame_analyses.description: The setup is visible but instruments have not yet entered the field.
The instrument with needle is entering the field.
The suture is being placed through the first mark on the drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle entry point appears slightly off-center.

frame_analyses.description: The suture exits the second mark.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Placement through the second mark is more accurate.

frame_analyses.description: The first throw is being started with a double throw technique.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand manipulation is steady; forming the surgeon's knot.

frame_analyses.description: The second single throw is commenced with a swap of hand roles.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Completed the wrap with a precise hand switch.

frame_analyses.description: The third single throw is in progress with another hand switch.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand switches are smooth and consistent.

frame_analyses.description: Scissors are being positioned to cut the suture.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Positioning is accurate for the cut.

frame_analyses.description: Both ends of the suture have been cut, the task is complete.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed without visible major errors.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Secure slit closure with no visible gaps.

technique_summary: The trainee demonstrated strong suture technique with precise hand-switching and knot security. Minor deviation penalties were noted but did not impact overall performance.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on precise entry at marked sites to reduce deviation.
Maintain consistent tension during knot tying phases.
strengths: Secure knot formation with complete slit closure.
